honest_posture: NOT 100% — real findings below. Compliance is a remediation target, not a starting claim.

controls.title: Relay API enforces authorization
controls.note: Live recon: /api/* return HTTP 200 with no token. Tailscale-private mitigates but does not authorize.

controls.title: API callers are authenticated
controls.note: No token required on control-plane endpoints. Add relay auth (bearer/mTLS) even inside the tailnet.

controls.title: Secrets not stored in cleartext repo files
controls.note: 54 secret findings incl. .env + .env.bak backups. Purge, rotate, gitignore, shred backups.

controls.title: No plaintext secrets at rest in tree
controls.note: Same secret sprawl; .env.bak.* files created during ops carry live keys.

controls.title: TLS on relay
controls.note: Live recon: HTTPS via nginx/1.31.2, HTTP 200 over TLS on the tailnet.

controls.title: Automated vuln scanning runs
controls.note: Trivy live: 1 HIGH/CRIT deps open. Scanning exists; remediation SLA needed (ConMon).

controls.title: Change-board gate on commits
controls.note: baseline_guard.py pre-commit invariant gate is live and passing on merit.

controls.title: Evidence + audit trail exist
controls.note: Evidence manifests + release attestations exist; tamper-evident MAC verified.

controls.title: ConMon program defined
controls.note: link_monitor 24/7 + gates exist; formal ConMon cadence + control re-assessment schedule being authored.

controls.title: Findings tracked to closure
controls.note: No ticketed backlog yet; Jira/kanban structure being authored to track each finding to closure.

top_findings.desc: chromadb: ChromaDB Python Project: Arbitrary code execution via pre-authentication code injection
